name: eds-mcp-server
description: MCP server for AEM Edge Delivery Services development — scaffolding, validation, configuration, and guidance tools for VS Code and Cursor

scripts.build: tsc && node -e "const fs=require('fs');for (const f of ['dist/index.js','dist/cli.js']){if(!fs.existsSync(f)) continue;const c=fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8');if(!c.startsWith('#!')) fs.writeFileSync(f,'#!/usr/bin/env node\n'+c);}" && chmod 755 dist/index.js dist/cli.js
